entry.title: Brother Bonding Time
entry.summary:
Author: Crystalnightterror

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,775Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 54

Summary: After receiving a message from their brother asking for help on a case Dick and Damien use this opportunity to see what’s wrong with Red Robin. Unfortunately what’s wrong is that Tim’s been corrupted into a useless set of holes. Unfortunately for them a similar fate awaits. (Who knew being converted into a mockery of who you once were and living your life as a sex slave strengthened brotherly bonds?)

entry.summary:

entry.title: Shadows of Desire
entry.summary:
Author: c0ca1ne_sunday

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,581Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 79

Summary: Damian Wayne is living with his father and the Bat-Family, everything was going perfectly. Until one day during training, things get a little too intimate with his adopted brother Dick – who, in Damian's humble opinion, is an idiot, but a hot idiot.These thoughts triggered a series of confusing feelings, new sensations, and self-discovery for the younger boy.Or, Damian is falling for Dick while wanting to slip his hand down his pants.

entry.title: Falter as an Afterthought
entry.summary:
Author: noctstate

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,118Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: “Damian?” Dick asks. Damian jerks from his arms and off the sofa. “You alright?” Damian’s shoulders are stiff, his back a perfectly straight line. He faces away from Dick. It wouldn’t take a detective to figure out what’s actually happening here. So Dick plays dumb, just a little bit.
